def.prof.nonProficientUse.name: Non-Proficient Use of Weapons and Armor

name.text: Non-Proficient Use of Weapons and Armor

specs.condition: one round spent pausing to listen
one turn; by aroma and color

target.pattern: identify which parts[\s\S]{0,90}?throw of (\d+)\+[\s\S]{0,1200}?special components on (\d+)\+[\s\S]{0,600}?special components on (\d+)\+

specs.note: Identifies which parts of a monster are special components.
Extracting toxin from poisonous plants; one dose on a success, spoiled plants on a failure. On an unmodified 1 the character is exposed and must make a Death saving throw.
Extracting toxin from poisonous plants; one dose on a success, spoiled plants on a failure. On an unmodified 1 the character is exposed and must make a Death saving throw.

specs.condition: using Adventuring to search or listen
specs.note: Used in place of the usual Adventuring search/listen target, not added to it.

target.pattern: proficiency throw of (\d+)\+[\s\S]{0,900}?diagnose illness on (\d+)\+[\s\S]{0,900}?diagnose illness on (\d+)\+

specs.note: Identifies whether the affliction is magical or mundane; no retry until further symptoms.

specs.condition: two ranks; the affliction must already be diagnosed

specs.note: On an unmodified 1 the character is exposed and must make a Death saving throw.

label.pattern: attempt to (use wands, \w+, and other magic items)

specs.note: No command word needed. On a failure the attempt backfires in some desultory way, at the Judge's discretion.
One weight category heavier than the class permits.

specs.condition: in armor this proficiency makes available
specs.note: A spellcaster may cast spells in it.

specs.condition: one rank per selection of the same art or craft
specs.note: One throw, improving at every rank; what it identifies is named on the page.
Per selection; the proficiency is repeatable.
Normal animals only. Friend of Bird and Beasts does not increase this bonus.

target.pattern: plants and fauna with a proficiency throw of (\d+)\+
plants and fauna with a throw of (\d+)\+

specs.condition: has the Friend of Birds and Beasts class power
specs.note: Replaces the base target; the reaction bonus does not improve with it.
Cowering, faltering, frightened.
Makes no morale check.

from.pattern: only a (-?\d+) penalty on attack throws

specs.note: Replaces the base non-visibility penalty; a smaller penalty, so a net gain.
The blinded surprise penalty does not apply.
The blinded speed reduction does not apply.
One tier applies, by the size of the bribe offered.
One tier applies, by the size of the bribe offered.
One tier applies, by the size of the bribe offered.
Parleying only. Stacks with Mystic Aura, but not with the other two tone proficiencies.
Familiar
Specializes one style the character is already proficient in.

specs.condition: 0th-level characters, in a settlement the character knows
specs.note: Which settlements the character knows is not tracked; the Judge confirms it applies.
Target-strength requirement is a Judge's call, not automated.
Adds one selected weapon group to the class list.
Stacks with any one of the three tone proficiencies.

specs.condition: the subject is potentially attracted to the character
settlements other than his home settlement
specs.note: No throw is needed in the character's own home settlement.
Replaces part of the divine repertoire with divine spells outside the character's god's list.
On a failure the same area cannot be searched again for a time. Each rank past the first improves this throw; neither that improvement nor the printed circumstance modifiers are modelled here.
Applies to these two throws only, not to proficiency throws generally.
Applies only if the character is separately proficient in Searching or Trapfinding, and only against wilderness traps.
Thrown once per day per trap by the Judge; a failure on an unmodified 1 destroys a crude trap. The yield is stated in the description.

target.pattern: trap on a throw of \d+-(\d+) on 1d6

specs.note: Thrown when a wandering monster turns up near managed traps; on a failure it lurks nearby instead.
